document: Bill of Lading or Sea Waybill
when_required: Required for ocean carriage documentation and cargo release; exact form depends on carrier, contract, and release model.
deadline: Before document release and cargo release; shipping instructions normally before carrier documentation cutoff.
cortex_action: Require B/L or sea waybill path and shipping instructions before shipment readiness can be marked clean.
known_limitations: Operational rule; legal effects differ between negotiable original B/L, sea waybill, and telex/electronic release.

when_required: Required by carrier/forwarder to prepare transport document and manifest data.
deadline: Before carrier documentation cutoff; exact cutoff is sailing/carrier-specific.
cortex_action: Block clean readiness if shipping instructions are missing before document cutoff.
known_limitations: Exact cutoff belongs to SEA-I schedule readiness and carrier/local terminal data.

when_required: Required for packed containers before vessel loading.
deadline: Before vessel loading and before the carrier/terminal VGM cutoff.
cortex_action: No VGM means no clean readiness for loading; prompt for verified gross mass method and submission status.
known_limitations: Exact submission cutoff is carrier/terminal-specific and belongs to SEA-I.

when_required: Required when shipment contains dangerous goods offered for sea transport.
deadline: Before carrier DG acceptance/documentation cutoff; before loading.
cortex_action: If SEA-A identifies DG cargo, require DG declaration before readiness can pass.
known_limitations: Full IMDG Code details are not embedded; carrier/terminal DG acceptance still required.

when_required: Required/expected when dangerous goods are packed into a container or vehicle for sea transport.
deadline: Before carrier DG/documentation cutoff; before loading.
cortex_action: For DG container shipments, require packing certificate status and packer responsible party.
known_limitations: Form format may vary by jurisdiction/carrier and IMDG edition.

when_required: Required for ocean cargo destined to the United States, with exceptions such as some bulk/breakbulk cases.
deadline: No later than 24 hours before cargo is loaded on the vessel destined to the United States.
cortex_action: For US imports, block clean readiness unless ISF status, filer, and deadline are confirmed.
known_limitations: Detailed ISF element validation and exceptions are not fully modeled in v1.

when_required: Required for goods brought to or transiting through the EU under ICS2, including maritime/inland waterway phase.
deadline: Advance safety/security filing before arrival; for maritime containerized freight, validate pre-loading filing timing with filer/carrier.
cortex_action: For EU/NI/NO/CH inbound or transit shipments, require ENS/ICS2 responsibility and submission status.
known_limitations: Exact party/deadline can differ by master/house filing model and release phase; needs filer validation.

when_required: Generally required for customs valuation, classification, and clearance of cross-border commercial goods.
deadline: Before export/import customs declaration and before destination clearance.
cortex_action: Require invoice data for cross-border commercial goods.
known_limitations: Country-specific invoice formats and data elements are not fully modeled in v1.

when_required: Generally required for package-level description, inspection, cargo handling, and customs support.
deadline: Before export/import customs declaration and before cargo handover if needed for handling.
cortex_action: Require package count, weight, dimensions, marks, and contents summary.
known_limitations: Country/carrier-specific packing list requirements may vary.

when_required: Conditionally required when buyer, destination country, preferential tariff claim, letter of credit, or trade agreement requires origin proof.
deadline: Before customs clearance or banking/document presentation deadline.
cortex_action: Ask whether preferential origin or buyer/bank requirements apply; hard gate only if required.
known_limitations: Country/product-specific origin rules are not modeled in v1.

when_required: Conditionally required for regulated, restricted, controlled, dual-use, food, pharmaceutical, wildlife, cultural, strategic, or other permit-controlled goods.
deadline: Before export release, import clearance, or booking where carrier requires permit evidence.
cortex_action: Flag regulated cargo for manual permit check; become hard gate if a permit is required.
known_limitations: Product/country-specific licensing is out of scope for v1 and needs trade compliance data.
